options.label: Enemy Corpse ^xE05030Life:
options.tooltip:
Sets the maximum ^xE05030life ^7of the target corpse for Detonate Dead and similar skills.
For reference, a level 70 monster has 8716 base ^xE05030life^7, and a level 80 monster has 15609.

options.label: Time spent stationary
options.tooltip: Applies mods that use `while stationary` and `per / every second while stationary`

options.label: Are you always on Low ^x7070FFMana?
options.tooltip:
You will automatically be considered to be on Low ^x7070FFMana ^7if you have at least 50% ^x7070FFmana ^7reserved,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

options.label: Are you always on Full ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield?
Are you always on Low ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield?
options.tooltip:
You will automatically be considered to be on Low ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield ^7if you have at least 50% ^x88FFFFES ^7reserved,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

options.label: Are your Minions always on Full ^xE05030Life?
Minion is always on Full ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield?
Have your Minions been created Recently?
Ailment calculation mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how the base damage for applying Ailments is calculated:
	Average: damage is based on the average application, including both crits and non-crits
	Crits Only: damage is based solely on Ailments inflicted with crits

options.label: Cooldown calculation mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how the cooldown for skills is calculated:
	Base: The cooldown is calculated with normal behavior.
	Average: The cooldown is adjusted to reflect the average time between uses, factoring in effects such as a chance to not consume a cooldown.

options.label: Random element mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how modifiers which choose a random element will function.
	Average: Modifiers will grant one third of their value to ^xB97123Fire^7, ^x3F6DB3Cold^7, and ^xADAA47Lightning ^7simultaneously
	^xB97123Fire ^7/ ^x3F6DB3Cold ^7/ ^xADAA47Lightning^7: Modifiers will grant their full value as the specified element
If a modifier chooses between just two elements, the full value can only be given as those two elements.

options.label: ^xE05030Life ^7regen calculation mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how ^xE05030Life ^7regeneration is calculated:
	Minimum: does not include burst regen
	Average: includes burst regen, averaged based on uptime
	Burst: includes full burst regen

options.label: Resource gain calculation mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how resource on hit/kill is calculated:
	Minimum: does not include chances
	Average: includes chance gains, averaged based on uptime
	Maximum: treats all chances as certain

options.label: EHP calc unlucky:
options.tooltip:
Sets the EHP calc to pretend its unlucky and reduce the effects of random events such as
	Block/Spell Block Chance
	Dodge/Spell Dodge Chance
	Spell Suppression Chance
	Avoidance Chance

options.label: Disable EHP gain on block/suppress:
options.tooltip: Sets the EHP calc to not apply gain on block and suppress effects

options.label: Armour calculation mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how Defending with Double Armour is calculated:
	Minimum: never Defend with Double Armour
	Average: Damage Reduction from Defending with Double Armour is proportional to chance
	Maximum: always Defend with Double Armour
This setting has no effect if you have 100% chance to Defend with Double Armour.

options.label: Exerted/Boosted calc mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how exerted attacks from Warcries are calculated:
Average: Averages out Warcry usage with cast time, attack speed and warcry cooldown.
Max Hit: Shows maximum hit for lining up all warcries.

options.label: Don't disable items
options.tooltip: Ignore the effects of things which disable items, like Bringer of Rain

options.label: Ignore Jewel Limits
options.tooltip: Ignore the limits on jewels

options.label: Include in ^x7070FFMana ^7spent Recently?
options.tooltip:
When enabled, the mana spent by Arcane Cloak used at full mana 
will be added to the value provided in # of ^x7070FFMana ^7spent Recently.

options.label: Chayula Breach Flames:
options.tooltip: Amount of Red, Blue & Purple Flames consumed during duration (max 10)

options.label: Banner Valour:
options.tooltip: The amount of valour consumed for the placed banner

options.label: Count Skill Reservation towards eHP?
options.tooltip: Use this option to disable the skill reservation factoring into eHP calculations

options.label: # of Brands attached to the enemy:
Skill is targeting the Branded enemy
Enemy ^xE05030Life ^7% higher than Player?
options.tooltip: Does the Enemy have a higher percentage of ^xE05030Life ^7remaining than the player

options.label: # of Corrupting Cry stacks on enemy
Damage % (if not maximum):
options.tooltip:
Cruelty is a buff provided by Cruelty Support which grants
up to 40% more damage over time to the skills it supports.

options.label: Skeleton ^xE05030Life:
options.tooltip: Sets the maximum ^xE05030Life ^7of the Skeleton that is being targeted.

options.label: Are you in Demon Form?
options.tooltip: Players need a minimum of 2 ^xE05030Life ^7to enter Demon Form, so you cannot use it with Chaos Inoculation

options.label: Glorious Madness Stacks
options.tooltip:
Glorious Madness Stacks grants:
	Eroding Touch: 6% inc Damage Taken per stack
	Paralysing Touch: 6% reduced Action Speed per stack
	Diluting Touch: 9% reduced Flask charges gained and 9% reduced Flask Effect per stack
	Wasting Touch: 9% reduced ^xE05030Life ^7and ^x88FFFFEnergy Shield ^7recovery rate per stack

options.label: Is Slipstream active?:
options.tooltip:
Greater Harbinger of Time Slipstream buff grants:
10% increased Action Speed
Buff affects the player and allies
Buff has a base duration of 8s with a 10s Cooldown

options.label: Is Slipstream active?:
options.tooltip:
Harbinger of Time Slipstream buff grants:
10% increased Action Speed
Buff affects the player, allies and enemies in a small radius
Buff has a base duration of 8s with a 20s Cooldown

options.label: Overkill damage:
options.tooltip: Herald of Ash's base ^xB97123Burning ^7damage is equal to 25% of Overkill damage.

options.label: # of seconds since Inevitable crit:
options.tooltip: Also implies you've crit recently if the value is 3s or below

options.label: Missing Unreserved ^x7070FFMana^7 %:
options.tooltip:
Ignores values outside the 0-100 range, defaults to 100% if not specified. 
A more realistic value would be to match your Arcane Cloak spend %.

options.label: Seconds building Stoicism:
options.tooltip: Seconds since last reset. Stoicism I: 1%/s (full 20s). Stoicism II: 2%/s (full 10s).

options.label: Enemy has Parry Debuff
options.tooltip:
The Parry debuff grants:
	Enemies take 50% more Attack Damage

options.label: # of Overlapping Spikes:
options.tooltip:

Maximum is limited by the number of Spikes of Perforate.

options.label: Is the enemy marked with Signal Prey?
Enable buffs:
options.tooltip: Enable any buff skills that your spectres have.

options.label: Enable curses:
options.tooltip: Enable any curse skills that your spectres have.

options.label: Blade Vortex blade count:
options.tooltip:
Sets the blade count for Blade Vortex skills used by spectres.
Default is 1; maximum is 5.

options.label: Sanguimancer Demon not on Low Life:
Are you animating Lingering Blades?
options.tooltip:
Enables additional damage given to Lingering Blades
The exact weapon is unknown but should be similar to Glass Shank

options.label: # of Shotgunning Projectiles:
options.tooltip: Maximum is limited by the number of Projectiles., default of 1, if Arrow nova then default of maximum projectiles

options.label: # of Enemies affected:
options.tooltip: Sets the number of enemies affected by Siphoning Trap.

options.label: # of Active Spectral Wolves:
options.tooltip:
Sets the number of active Spectral Wolves.
The maximum number of Spectral Wolves is 10.

options.label: Steel Wards:
options.tooltip:
Steel Wards are gained from using Shattering Steel of Ammunition with at least 2 Steel Shards.
You can have up to 6 Steel Wards, and each grants +8% chance to Block Projectile Attack Damage.

options.label: Enable buffs:
options.tooltip: Enable any buff skills that your Companions have.

options.label: Enable curses:
options.tooltip: Enable any curse skills that your Companions have.

options.label: % chance for second proj to hit:
options.tooltip: Override to the percent chance for the secondary projectiles to hit, default of 60% or 80% with helm enchant. (20% per secondary projectile)

options.label: # of Overlapping Pods:
options.tooltip: Maximum is limited by the number of Projectiles.

options.label: Total Resonance Count:
options.tooltip: Sets the total Resonance Count.

options.label: Twister gained ^x3F6DB3Cold^7 Element:
options.tooltip: Twister has passed over ^x3F6DB3Cold^7 Ground or consumed a ^x3F6DB3Cold^7 Whirlwind.

options.label: Twister gained ^xB97123Fire^7 Element:
options.tooltip: Twister has passed over ^xB97123Fire^7 Ground or consumed a ^xB97123Fire^7 Whirlwind.

options.label: Twister gained ^xADAA47Lightning^7 Element:
options.tooltip: Twister has passed over ^xADAA47Lightning^7 Ground or consumed a ^xADAA47Lightning^7 Whirlwind.

options.label: Warcry Power:
options.tooltip:
Power determines how strong your Warcry buffs will be, and is based on the total strength of nearby enemies.
Power is assumed to be 20 if your target is a Boss, but you can override it here if necessary.
	Each Normal enemy grants 1 Power
	Each Magic enemy grants 2 Power
	Each Rare enemy grants 10 Power
	Each Unique enemy grants 20 Power

options.label: Whirlwind gained ^x3F6DB3Cold^7 Element:
options.tooltip: Whirlwind has passed over ^x3F6DB3Cold^7 Ground.

options.label: Whirlwind gained ^xB97123Fire^7 Element:
options.tooltip: Whirlwind has passed over ^xB97123Fire^7 Ground.

options.label: Whirlwind gained ^xADAA47Lightning^7 Element:
options.tooltip: Whirlwind has passed over ^xADAA47Lightning^7 Ground.

options.label: Is the skill Empowered?
options.tooltip: Skills can be temporarily Empowered by certain buff skills.

options.label: Absolution: Count skill damage once
options.tooltip:
Your Absolution Skill Damage will not be scaled with Count setting.
By default it multiplies both minion count and skill hit count which leads to incorrect
Total DPS calculation since Absolution cannot inherently shotgun.
Do not enable if you use Spell Totem support, Spell Cascade support or similar supports

options.label: Damage mitigated:
options.tooltip:
Molten Shell reflects damage to the enemy,
based on the amount of damage it has mitigated.

options.label: Damage mitigated:
options.tooltip:
Vaal Molten Shell reflects damage to the enemy,
based on the amount of damage it has mitigated in the last second.

options.label: Enemy size preset:
options.tooltip:
Configure the radius of an enemy hitbox which is used in calculating some area multi-hitting (shotgunning) effects.

Small sets the radius to 2.
	Most monsters and the players' character are this size.
Medium sets the radius to 3.
	This is the size of most humanoid bosses (i.e. The Maven; The Shaper; Izaro)
Large sets the radius to 5.
	This is the size of some larger bosses (i.e. King Kaom; Vaal Oversoul)
Huge sets the radius to 11.
	This is the size of some of the largest bosses (i.e. Nucleus of the Maven; Tsoagoth, The Brine King)

options.label: Enemy radius:
options.tooltip: Configure the radius of an enemy hitbox to calculate some area overlapping (shotgunning) effects.

options.label: Total Spectre Life:
options.tooltip: The total life of your Spectres that can be taken before yours (used by jinxed juju)

options.label: Total Totem Life:
options.tooltip: The total life of your Totems (excluding Vaal Rejuvenation Totem) that can be taken before yours (used by totem mastery)

options.label: Total life pool of Sentinel of Radiance
Total Vaal Rejuvenation Totem Life:
options.tooltip: The total life of your Vaal Rejuvenation Totems that can be taken before yours

options.label: Do you wait for Max Unleash Seals?
Ruthless Support Mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how the hit/ailment effect of Ruthless Support is calculated:
	Average: damage is based on the average application
	Max Effect: damage is based on maximum effect

options.label: Chance To Ignore PDR Mode:
options.tooltip:
Controls how the chance on hit to ignore enemy physical damage reduction is calculated:
	Minimum: never ignores unless chance is at least 100%
	Average: damage is based on the average application
	Max Effect: always ignores if you have any chance

options.label: Do your Minions use Power Charges?
Do your Minions use Frenzy Charges?
Do your Minions use Endur. Charges?
# of Rampage Kills:
options.tooltip:
Rampage grants the following, up to 1000 stacks:
	1% increased Movement Speed per 20 Rampage
	2% increased Damage per 20 Rampage
You lose Rampage if you do not get a Kill within 5 seconds.

options.label: # of Soul Eater Stacks:
options.tooltip:
Soul Eater grants the following, up to a base of 45 stacks:
	5% increased Attack Speed
	5% increased Cast Speed
	1% increased character size per stack.

options.label: Do you have Onslaught?
options.tooltip:

this will enable the Onslaught buff itself. (Grants 20% increased Attack, Cast, and Movement Speed)

options.label: Do you have Arcane Surge?
options.tooltip:

this will enable the Arcane Surge buff itself. (Grants 15% increased Cast Speed and 20% more Mana Regeneration rate)

options.label: Do you have Quicksand Hourglass?
options.tooltip: this will enable the Quicksand Hourglass buff itself.

options.label: Do your minions have Onslaught?

options.label: Do you have Adrenaline?
options.tooltip:

options.label: Do you have Divinity?

options.tooltip:
10 units equals 1 metre
Player and Minion Attacks incur an Accuracy penalty based on distance from the origin of the damage to the target,
with no penalty for targets within 2 metres and up to 90% less Accuracy for targets further than 12 metres away-

options.label: # bolts reloaded past 6 seconds
options.tooltip:
Override number of bolts reloaded in the past 6 seconds.
Used to calculate damage bonus from Fresh Clip I support.
Assumes calculated average if no value is specified.

options.label: # bolts reloaded past 8 seconds
options.tooltip:
Override number of bolts reloaded in the past 8 seconds.
Used to calculate damage bonus from Fresh Clip II support.
Assumes calculated average if no value is specified.

options.label: # different Ammo Types Shot past 10s
options.tooltip: Number of different Ammunition types used in tha past 10s

options.label: # different Grenade Types Shot past 10s
options.tooltip: Number of different Grenade types used in tha past 10s

options.label: Is the enemy at Close Range?
Enemy in Your Presence Duration
options.tooltip: Number of seconds the enemy has been in your presence.

options.label: Enemy exited Presence Recently?
options.tooltip: Enemy has exited your Presence recently

options.label: Enemy entered Presence Recently?
options.tooltip: Enemy has entered your Presence recently

options.label: Is the enemy Moving?
options.tooltip: Bleeding deals an extra 100% damage while the target is moving, or if the Bleeding is Aggravated

options.label: Is the Bleed Aggravated?
options.tooltip: Bleeding deals an extra 100% damage while the target is moving, or if the Bleeding is Aggravated

options.label: Is enemy Armour Broken?
options.tooltip:
Some Skills, Items, Support Gems and other effects can Break Armour, which lowers a target's Armour by a specified amount.
If this brings the target's Armour value to 0, their Armour is Fully Broken for 12 seconds.

options.label: # of Broken Armour (if not maximum):
options.tooltip:
Use this field to set a custom Armour Break value.
If left empty or set to 0, Fully Broken Armour will be assumed.
Armour cannot be broken below 0 unless stated otherwise.
If so, Armour can be broken up to the inverse of its original value.

options.label: Is the enemy Cursed?
options.tooltip:
The enemy will automatically be considered to be Cursed if you have at least one curse enabled,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

options.label: Is the enemy Dazed?
options.tooltip: Dazed enemies take 50% more stun buildup for 8 seconds.

options.label: # of Bleeds on enemy (if not average):
# of Rupture stacks?
options.tooltip: Rupture applies more bleed damage and faster bleeds for 3 seconds, up to 3 stacks

options.label: # of Incision Stacks:
options.tooltip: Incision applies 10% chance to Bleed the enemy, up to 10 stacks.

options.label: # of Poisons on enemy (if not average):
# of Withered Stacks:
options.tooltip: Withered applies 5% increased ^xD02090Chaos ^7Damage Taken to the enemy, up to 10 stacks.

options.label: # of Corrosion Stacks:
options.tooltip:
Each stack of Corrosion applies -5000 to total Armour and -1000 to total ^x33FF77Evasion Rating ^7to the enemy.
Corrosion lasts 4 seconds and refreshes the duration of existing Corrosion stacks
Corrosion has no stack limit

options.label: # of Ensnare Stacks:
options.tooltip:
While ensnared, enemies take increased Projectile Damage from Attack Hits
Ensnared enemies always count as moving, and have less movement speed while trying to break the snare.

options.label: Is the enemy Maimed?
options.tooltip:
In addition to allowing 'against Maimed Enemies' modifiers to apply,
 Maim applies the following effects.
 -30% Reduced Movement Speed 
 -15% Reduced ^x33FF77Evasion

options.label: Is the enemy Blinded?
options.tooltip:
In addition to allowing 'against Blinded Enemies' modifiers to apply,
 Blind applies the following effects.
 -20% Less Accuracy 
 -20% Less ^x33FF77Evasion

options.label: Effect of Blind (if not maximum):
options.tooltip: If you have a guaranteed source of Blind, the strongest one will apply.

options.label: Is the enemy Pinned?
options.tooltip:
Pinned enemies cannot move and cannot evade 4 seconds.
 They are also Light Stunned when they become pinned.

options.label: Is the enemy Debilitated?
options.tooltip: Debilitated enemies deal 10% less damage.

options.label: Is the enemy Immobilised?
options.tooltip: A target is immobilised if it cannot move, for example due to being Frozen, Pinned, Heavy Stunned, or Electrocuted.

options.label: Is the enemy Pacified?
options.tooltip: Enemies are Pacified after 60% of Pacify's duration has expired

options.label: Is the enemy ^xB97123Ignited?
options.tooltip: This also implies that the enemy is ^xB97123Burning.

options.label: Is the enemy ^xB97123Scorched?
options.tooltip:
^xB97123Scorched ^7enemies have lowered elemental resistances, up to -30%.
This option will also allow you to input the effect of ^xB97123Scorched.

options.label: Effect of ^xB97123Scorched:
options.tooltip: This effect will only be applied while you can inflict ^xB97123Scorched.

options.label: ^xB97123Scorch ^7Stacks
options.tooltip: Amount of stacks of ^xB97123Scorch ^7applied to the enemy.

options.label: Is the enemy on ^xB97123Scorched ^7Ground?
options.tooltip: This also implies that the enemy is ^xB97123Scorched.

options.label: ^xADAA47Chill ^7Stacks
options.tooltip: Amount of stacks of ^xADAA47Chill ^7applied to the enemy.

options.label: ^x3F6DB3Hoarfrost ^7Stacks
options.tooltip: Amount of stacks of ^x3F6DB3Hoarfrost ^7applied to the enemy.

options.label: Is the enemy on ^x3F6DB3Chilled ^7Ground?
options.tooltip: This also implies that the enemy is ^x3F6DB3Chilled.

options.label: Is the enemy ^x3F6DB3Brittle?
options.tooltip:
Hits against ^x3F6DB3Brittle ^7enemies have up to +6% Critical Strike Chance.
This option will also allow you to input the effect of ^x3F6DB3Brittle.

options.label: Effect of ^x3F6DB3Brittle:
options.tooltip: This effect will only be applied while you can inflict ^x3F6DB3Brittle.

options.label: Is the enemy on ^xADAA47Brittle ^7Ground?
options.tooltip: This also implies that the enemy is ^xADAA47Brittle.

options.label: Is the enemy ^xADAA47Shocked?
options.tooltip:
In addition to allowing any 'against ^xADAA47Shocked ^7Enemies' modifiers to apply,
this will allow you to input the effect of the ^xADAA47Shock ^7applied to the enemy.

options.label: Effect of ^xADAA47Shock^7 (if not maximum):
options.tooltip:
If you have a guaranteed source of ^xADAA47Shock^7,
the strongest one will apply instead unless this option would apply a stronger ^xADAA47Shock.

options.label: ^xADAA47Shock ^7Stacks
options.tooltip: Amount of stacks of ^xADAA47Shock ^7applied to the enemy.

options.label: Is the enemy on ^xADAA47Shocked ^7Ground?
options.tooltip: This also implies that the enemy is ^xADAA47Shocked.

options.label: Is the enemy ^xADAA47Sapped?
options.tooltip: ^xADAA47Sapped ^7enemies deal less damage, up to 20%.

options.label: Effect of ^xADAA47Sap:
options.tooltip:
If you have a guaranteed source of ^xADAA47Sap^7,
the strongest one will apply instead unless this option would apply a stronger ^xADAA47Sap.

options.label: Is the enemy on ^xADAA47Sapped ^7Ground?
options.tooltip: This also implies that the enemy is ^xADAA47Sapped.

options.label: Is the enemy Exposed to ^xB97123Fire?
options.tooltip: This applies -20% ^xB97123Fire Resistance ^7to the enemy.

options.label: Is the enemy Exposed to ^x3F6DB3Cold?
options.tooltip: This applies -20% ^x3F6DB3Cold Resistance ^7to the enemy.

options.label: Is the enemy Exposed to ^xADAA47Lightning?
options.tooltip: This applies -20% ^xADAA47Lightning Resistance ^7to the enemy.

options.label: Is the enemy Intimidated?
options.tooltip: Intimidate is a Debuff that inflicts 10% increased damage taken and 10% reduced damage dealt.

options.label: Is the enemy Crushed?
options.tooltip: Crushed enemies have 15% reduced Physical Damage Reduction.

options.label: Is the enemy near you Linked target?
Is the enemy Unnerved?
options.tooltip: Unnerved enemies take 10% increased Spell Damage.

options.label: Is the enemy Critically Weak
options.tooltip:
Hits against Critically Weak enemies have up to +10% Critical Strike Chance.
This option will also allow you to input the effect of Critical Weakness.

options.label: Critical weakness stacks:
options.tooltip: Each stack of critical weakness applies +0.5% to critical strike chance against the affected target

options.label: Is the enemy covered in Ash?
options.tooltip:
Covered in Ash applies the following to the enemy:
	20% increased ^xB97123Fire ^7Damage taken
	20% less Movement Speed

options.label: Is the enemy covered in Frost?
options.tooltip:
Covered in Frost applies the following to the enemy:
	20% increased ^x3F6DB3Cold ^7Damage taken
	50% less Critical Strike Chance

options.label: Is the enemy on Consecrated Ground?
Is the enemy on Profane Ground?
options.tooltip:
Enemies on Profane Ground receive the following modifiers:
	10% increased Effect of Curses
	100% increased chance to be Critically Hit

options.label: Is the enemy on Fungal Ground?
options.tooltip: Enemies on your Fungal Ground have -10% to all Resistances.

options.label: Is the enemy in the Frost Shield area?
Is the enemy in RF or Scorching Ray:
Ignore Skill Hit Damage?
options.tooltip: This option prevents EE from being reset by the hit damage of your main skill.

options.label: Is the enemy in your Link beams?
options.tooltip: This option sets whether an enemy is between you and your linked target.

options.label: Enemy hit you with ^xB97123Fire Damage^7?
options.tooltip: This option sets whether or not the enemy has hit you with ^xB97123Fire Damage^7 in the last 4 seconds.

options.label: Enemy hit you with ^x3F6DB3Cold Damage^7?
options.tooltip: This option sets whether or not the enemy has hit you with ^x3F6DB3Cold Damage^7 in the last 4 seconds.

options.label: Enemy hit you with ^xADAA47Light. Damage^7?
options.tooltip: This option sets whether or not the enemy has hit you with ^xADAA47Lightning Damage^7 in the last 4 seconds.

options.label: Enemy Level:
options.tooltip:
This overrides the default enemy level used to estimate your hit, ^x33FF77evade ^7chance, and damage reduction.

The maximum level for normal enemies and all bosses is 85.

The default level of normal enemies and bosses scales with player level unless manually set.

The default and minimum level for pinnacle bosses and uber pinnacle bosses is 82.

options.label: Is the enemy Rare or Unique?
options.tooltip:
The enemy will automatically be considered to be Unique if they are a Boss,
but you can use this option to force it if necessary.

options.label: Is the enemy a Boss?
options.tooltip:
Bosses' damage is monster damage scaled to an average damage of their attacks
This is divided by 4.40 to represent 4 damage types + some (40% as much) ^xD02090chaos
^7Fill in the exact damage numbers if more precision is needed

Bosses' armour and evasion multiplier are calculated using the average of the boss type

Standard Boss adds the following modifiers:
	+30% to enemy Elemental Resistances
	^790% of monster Damage of each type
	400% of monster Damage total

Guardian / Pinnacle Boss adds the following modifiers:
	+50% to enemy Elemental Resistances
	^7150% of monster Armour
	124% of monster ^x33FF77Evasion
	^7181% of monster Damage of each type
	800% of monster Damage total
	3% penetration

Uber Pinnacle Boss adds the following modifiers:
	+50% to enemy Elemental Resistances
	^7125% of monster Armour
	116% of monster ^x33FF77Evasion
	^770% less to enemy Damage taken
	235% of monster Damage of each type
	1000% of monster Damage total
	8% penetration

options.label: Delirious Effect:
options.tooltip:
Delirium scales enemy 'less Damage Taken' as well as enemy 'increased Damage dealt'
At 100% effect:
Enemies Deal 30% Increased Damage
Enemies take 80% Less Damage

options.label: Enemy Max Resistance is always 75%
options.tooltip:
Enemy Maximum resistance is increased by the resistance configurations 
This locks it at the default value

options.label: Enemy Skill Roll Range %:
options.tooltip:
The percentage of the roll range the enemy hits for 
 eg at 100% the enemy deals its maximum damage

options.label: Enemy Damage Type:
options.tooltip:
Controls which types of damage the EHP calculation uses:
	Average: uses the Average of all typed damage types (except Damage Over Time and Untyped)

If a specific damage type is selected, that will be the only type used.

options.label: Enemy attack / cast time in ms:
Custom PvP Damage multiplier percent:
options.tooltip: This multiplies the damage of a given skill in pvp, for instance any with damage multiplier specific to pvp (from skill or support or item like sire of shards)

options.label: Enemy Skill Physical Damage:
options.tooltip:
This overrides the default damage amount used to estimate your damage reduction from armour.
The default is 1.5 times the enemy's base damage, which is the same value
used in-game to calculate the estimate shown on the character sheet.
